query:
INSERT INTO teams (id, seasonId, masterTeamId, createdAt) VALUES
(1, 1, 1, NOW()),
(2, 1, 2, NOW()),
(1, 240001, 1, NOW()),
(2, 240001, 2, NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE createdAt = NOW();
